missingEdge: Doctrine L6 Ecosystem Layer responsibility is real but distributed across three unconsolidated active-tree locations; doctrine-named /examples root does not exist.
impact: No functional gap; consolidation/root-path alignment is cosmetic, not a missing capability.

closeCondition.conditionText: A governed L6 consolidation decision is accepted that either creates a root /examples path or formally records the three-location distribution as permanent.

reopenCondition.conditionText: Operator authorizes an L6 consolidation review.

actionOwner: PARKED_WITH_REASON: cosmetic path-alignment gap only, tracked by MSEA-R96/R97
boundaryCaveat: Distributed across docs/, EXTENSIONS/examples/, and governance/toolkit/06_EXAMPLES/; not consolidated into one root path; this is documented drift, not an error in any individual location.
